site.name: La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
site.tagline: Holiday home with heated indoor pool & spa — Puyricard, Aix-en-Provence

footer.madeWith: A family holiday home in Provence

home.seoTitle: Holiday home with heated indoor pool in Aix-en-Provence — La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
home.seoDescription: Family holiday home for 4 with a heated indoor pool and spa in Puyricard, Aix-en-Provence. Weekly rental in summer, monthly rental of the house from October to June.
home.heroTitle: La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
home.heroSubtitle: A family holiday home with a heated indoor pool & spa, tucked into an enclosed pine garden on the Puyricard plateau.

highlights.title: Heated indoor pool
highlights.text: Private 530 × 330 cm pool, water at 29-30 °C, counter-current swimming, open from July to late October.

highlights.title: Optional Hotspring spa
highlights.text: Covered 4-seat spa, adjustable from 26 to 40 °C, for private use — €200/week.

highlights.title: Enclosed pine garden
highlights.text: Terrace, plancha, table tennis, trampoline, sun loungers and bikes, in a quiet, leafy setting.

highlights.title: Sleeps 4
highlights.text: Comfortable 2-bedroom home, fully equipped kitchen, air conditioning and internet.

home.weekText: From July to October, Saturday to Saturday, with access to the heated pool for 4 guests. Online booking.
home.monthText: The house only, without pool or spa, from 1 October to 30 June. Monthly or seasonal, on request.

house.seoTitle: The house — 2-bedroom home for 4 | La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
house.seoDescription: Holiday home in Aix-en-Provence: 2 bedrooms, equipped kitchen, bright living room, enclosed garden, heated indoor pool and optional spa.
house.title: The house
house.intro: Discover this lovely holiday home for four guests, with an indoor pool, in Aix-en-Provence, Puyricard. Perfect for unwinding, it offers modern comfort in a pleasant setting.
house.livingText: The living room has large bay windows opening onto the garden. It features a leather sofa, three armchairs, a coffee table, a flat-screen TV (43-inch Smart TV) and a mini Hi-Fi system.
house.kitchenText: The kitchen, open to the living room, is fully equipped: dishwasher, washing machine, oven, ceramic hob, fridge-freezer, microwave, toaster and filter coffee maker.
house.outdoorText: The private garden, shaded by pines, has a terrace with garden furniture perfect for outdoor meals. A gas plancha, a table-tennis table and sun loungers are provided. Children will love the trampoline. Bikes are also available. On-site parking for 3 cars.
house.accessText: This 2-bedroom holiday home in Aix-en-Provence for 4 guests, with garden and terrace, is easy to reach by car with on-site parking. Around 15 minutes by taxi from Aix-en-Provence station. Marseille-Provence airport is about 30 minutes away by car. Access is via an automatic gate with remote control.
notes: End-of-stay cleaning (normal use), towels and linen included.
Spa option: €200 per week on request, all year round.
Parties and festive events are not permitted.
Classic and e-Connect holiday vouchers accepted.
Check-in from 4 pm — check-out by 11 am.

pool.seoTitle: Heated indoor pool & spa | La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
pool.seoDescription: Private heated indoor pool at 29-30 °C with counter-current swimming, plus an optional 4-seat Hotspring spa, in Puyricard, Aix-en-Provence.
pool.title: Heated indoor pool & spa
pool.lead: Treat yourself to a moment of serenity at La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins, a haven of peace on the Puyricard plateau, north of Aix-en-Provence. A relaxation space just for you, in a privileged natural setting, ideal for recharging after a day of exploring Provence.
pool.poolText: Enjoy a private pool of 530 × 330 × 140 cm, accessible directly from the living room or the terrace. Its water, kept at 29-30 °C, promises moments of relaxation in complete privacy. Fitted with a counter-current swim system.
pool.spaText: For total relaxation, choose the covered 4-seat “Hotspring” spa, accessible from the indoor pool. Temperature adjustable from 26 to 40 °C, massage jets, cosy atmosphere: everything is designed for your wellbeing.
pool.noParties: Parties and festive events are not permitted.
pool.heatingNote: Pool heated from July to late October. The pool is not heated in December, January and February.

rates.seoTitle: Rates & Booking | La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
rates.seoDescription: Indicative weekly rates (July to October) and monthly rental of the house (October to June). Online booking via chambresdhotes.org.
rates.title: Rates & Booking
rates.indicativeNote: The prices below are indicative (“from…”). Exact, up-to-date rates and availability are shown by the booking module below when you select your dates.
rates.weekIntro: Bookings run Saturday to Saturday. The rate includes access to the heated pool for 4 guests. The spa is not included (option).
conditions: 20% at booking (card or e-Connect holiday vouchers), balance on key handover.
Accepted: bank card, holiday vouchers & e-Connect, cheques.
For cancellation or rescheduling, at least 1 month's notice before the start of the stay is required (refund or rescheduling possible).
rates.monthText: The house only, without pool or spa, available continuously from 1 October to 30 June. Monthly or seasonal depending on dates and availability. Reference rate: from €1400/month, all charges included (water, electricity, internet). Electric-vehicle socket option: +€100/month. Mobility or seasonal lease on supporting documents (lease of 1 to 9 months).
rates.otaNote: On intermediary platforms (Airbnb, Booking, Abritel, Leboncoin…), prices are higher due to commissions and taxes (18% on average), except on chambresdhotes.org.

discover.seoTitle: Things to do around Aix-en-Provence | La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
discover.seoDescription: Getaways, activities and good addresses around Puyricard and Aix-en-Provence: châteaux, the Luberon, the Calanques, Cassis, restaurants and ice-cream makers.
discover.title: Discover the area
discover.intro: Our favourites around La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins, from the nearest to the furthest.

contact.seoTitle: Contact & directions | La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
contact.seoDescription: Contact La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins in Puyricard, Aix-en-Provence: phone, email, form, map and directions.
contact.title: Contact & directions
contact.intro: For any request, feel free to write to us using the form below, or to give us a call.
contact.howToCome: About 15 minutes by taxi from Aix-en-Provence station, and 30 minutes from Marseille-Provence airport. Access is via an automatic gate with remote control. On-site parking for 3 cars.

form.name: Name
form.consent: I agree that my data may be used to respond to my request.
form.success: Thank you, your message has been sent. We will reply shortly.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or give us a call.

monthForm.title: Monthly rental request
monthForm.intro: Tell us about your plans: the period, the length and the number of guests. We review each request individually depending on dates and availability.
monthForm.period: Preferred period (full months, between October and June)
